health_conditions: local site reactions (redness, itching) to peptides

side_effects.description: Severe anaphylaxis-like symptoms requiring EMS triage approximately 30 minutes after injection: low blood sugar, loss of vision, tongue swelling, heart palpitations, fainting. Family noticed and called EMS.

protocol_notes: Injected intramuscularly in upper right glute, same site used for TRT injections without previous problems. Always had local redness and itching reactions to peptides. Suspects hitting a vein triggered sudden systemic allergic reaction. No known long-term damage.
